entity: Anthony Davis 59 PTS + 20 REB vs Detroit Pistons on 2016-02-21 (NOP 111-106; one of only a handful of 50-point/20-rebound games in NBA history)

query_target.sql: SELECT pts FROM analytics_player_game_complete WHERE full_name = 'Anthony Davis' AND game_date = '2016-02-21' AND pts = 59 AND reb = 20

notes: Active player; match:gte per the active-player convention. The SQL includes reb=20 as a discriminator to uniquely identify the row (Davis has multiple 59+ point games). The fixture pins the 50-point/20-rebound combo on the date BBR records it.
